svg.title: Multiplayer Tic-Tac-Toe system architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram: React frontend on Vercel connects via WebSocket and REST to Nakama server with Go runtime plugin on DigitalOcean, backed by PostgreSQL and Nakama leaderboard storage

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the React frontend structure for this Nakama Tic-Tac-Toe game')
sendPrompt('Explain the Nakama server configuration for this multiplayer Tic-Tac-Toe game')
sendPrompt('Walk me through each Go runtime plugin handler in this Tic-Tac-Toe Nakama game')
sendPrompt('How does Nakama use PostgreSQL — what data is stored there?')
sendPrompt('How does the Nakama leaderboard API work for recording wins and streaks?')

svg.text: Click any component to learn more
